person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
geni.com
Ramón Berenguer 'Alfonso el Casto' de Aragón, rey de Aragón
Spanish: Rey de Aragón (1162-1196), Conde de Barcelona (1162-1196) Alfonso II "El Casto" de Aragón, rey de Aragón, French: El Casto Alfonso II d'Aragon, rey de Aragón
Also Known As:	"el Casto", "the Chaste", "the Troubadour", "King of Aragon", "Alfons I", "Count of Barcelona"
Birthdate:	March 01, 1157
Birthplace:	Villamayor del Valle, Huesca, Aragon, España (Spain)
Death:	April 25, 1195 (38)
Perpignan, Languedoc-Roussillon, France
Place of Burial:	Poblet, Catalonia, Spain
Immediate Family:	
Son of Ramon Berenguer IV "the Saint" count of Barcelona and Petronila Ramírez, reina de Aragón
Husband of Sancha of Castile; Mafalda and Countess Garsenda de Sabran of Forcalquier

Father of 
Constance Sicily; 
Pedro II el Católico, rey de Aragón;
 Alphonse II Bérenger, comte de Provence; 
Éléonore d'Aragon, comtesse consort de Toulouse; 
Sancho, Infante de Aragón;
 Ramón Berenguer, Infante de Aragón; 
Sancha d'Aragon, comtesse consort de Toulouse; 
Fernando, Infante de Aragón and 
Dulce, Infanta de Aragón 

Brother of Pedro, infante de Aragón; Raimond Bérenger III, comte de Provence; Dulce de Aragão, rainha-consorte de Portugal and Sanç I d'Aragón, comte de Cerdanya
Half brother of Ramón Berenguer de Barcelona, arzobispo de Narbona
Occupation:	Rey de Aragón (1162-1196), conde de Barcelona (1162-1196), comte de Provence (1166-1196), comte de Roussillon (1172)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alphonse II roi d'Aragon於1157年3月25日出生在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡時，他的父親Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona43歲，母親Rainha Petronilla de Aragón20歲。他於1174年1月18日與Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1196年4月25日在法國奧其坦尼培列內-利塔利斯培爾皮南享年39歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納文波吉波布萊特莫內斯爾 德 波布萊特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alphonse II roi d'Aragon于1157年3月25日出生在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡时，他的父亲Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona43岁，母亲Rainha Petronilla de Aragón20岁。他于1174年1月18日与Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1196年4月25日在法国奧其坦尼培列內-利塔利斯培爾皮南享年39岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納文波吉波布萊特莫內斯爾 德 波布萊特。

nameMeanings.name: Alphonse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Spanish Alfonso, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin. It is probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready, prompt’. Alternatively, the first element may be ala ‘all’, hadu ‘struggle’, or hild ‘battle’ forms are found to support each derivation, so it is possible that several Visigothic names that were originally distinct have fallen together. The -ph- spelling is the result of classical influences (or classical pretensions). St Alphonsus was a 9th-century bishop of Astorga, who spent the last years of his life at the abbey of St Stephen de Ribas de Sil in Galicia. Alphonse has been occasionally used in the English-speaking world, especially among West Indians and African Americans. The Latinized form Alphonsus has been used in Ireland as an equivalent of the Gaelic name Anluan .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Alphonse II roi d'Aragon was born on 25 March 1157, in Huesca, Aragón, Spain, his father, Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona, was 43 and his mother, Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, was 20. He married Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón on 18 January 1174, in Zaragoza, Aragón, Spain. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 April 1196, in Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Occitanie, France, at the age of 39, and was buried in Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alphonse II roi d'Aragon est né le 25 mars 1157, à Huesca, Aragón, Espagne, son père, Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón le 18 janvier 1174, à Zaragoza, Aragón, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1196, à Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alphonse II roi d'Aragon am 25. März 1157 in Huesca, Aragón, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona 43 und seine Mutter Rainha Petronilla de Aragón 20. Er hat am 18. Januar 1174 in Zaragoza, Aragón, Spanien Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. April 1196 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Occitanie, Frankreich und wurde in Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alphonse II roi d'Aragon è nato il il 25 marzo 1157 nel Huesca, Aragón, Spagna, il suo padre, Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón il 18 gennaio 1174, nel Zaragoza, Aragón, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 aprile 1196, nel Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ko.lifeSummary: Alphonse II roi d'Aragon(이)가 1157년 3월 25일 스페인 아라그o 후스카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Rainha Petronilla de Aragón(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1174년 1월 18일 스페인 아라그o 자라고자에서 Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1196년 4월 25일 프랑스 옥시탠이 p이ee스-리탤스 p르피그난에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 터아라곤아 비보드i 포블렛 머네스티르 데 포블렛에 묻혔다.

pt.25 mars 1157–25 April 1196: 25 de março de 1157–25 de abril de 1196
pt.Santa María de Poblet Monastery: Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espanha
pt.Borgo San Dalmazzo, Privincia di Cuneo,: Borgo San Dalmazzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alphonse II roi d'Aragon nasceu em 25 de março de 1157, em Huesca, Aragón, Espanha, seu pai, Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón em 18 de janeiro de 1174, em Zaragoza, Aragón, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1196, em Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Occitanie, França, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alphonse II roi d'Aragon родился 25 марта 1157 г. в местности хуеска, арагoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón 18 января 1174 г. в местности зарагоза, арагoн, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 апреля 1196 г. в местности пирпигнан, пирeнeес-ориентеилесь, окситани, Франция в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности моунестир де поблет, поблет, вимбодi, таррагона, каталуня, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alphonse II roi d'Aragon nació el 25 de marzo de 1157, en Huesca, Aragón, España, su papá, Ramon Berenguer IV de Barcelona, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Rainha Petronilla de Aragón, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón el 18 de enero de 1174, en Zaragoza, Aragón, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de abril de 1196, en Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Monestir de Poblet, Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Cataluña, España.
